query: show me new born care impatient care cost
answer:
| Benefit | Service | In-Network | Out-of-Network | Limitations |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| Newborn Care | Inpatient care | Deductible, then 20% coinsurance | Deductible, then 40% coinsurance | Data Not Found |
| Newborn Care | Office and clinic visits | Kinwell Clinics: $0 copay per visit, deductible waived  All Other Non-Specialist: $25 copay per visit, deductible waived  All Other Specialist: $40 copay per visit, deductible waived | Deductible, then 40% coinsurance | Data Not Found |
| Newborn Care | Other outpatient services | Deductible, then 20% coinsurance | Deductible, then 40% coinsurance | Data Not Found |
source: Premera Employees Health Plan – Standard PPO Retiree Plan
